note: Hand-entered phoenix one-off events (curated holiday programming, etc.). Stable id, real lat/lon, ISO local startDateTime/endDateTime with the local offset. Past events are filtered automatically.

events.title: Fabulous Phoenix 4th 2026: Free July 4th Fireworks Festival at Steele Indian School Park
events.description: Celebrate Independence Day at the free Fabulous Phoenix 4th, one of the largest July 4th fireworks displays in the Southwest at Steele Indian School Park. This family-friendly festival features live music, food vendors, a car show, and a kids' zone with rides and inflatables before the fireworks finale at 9:40 p.m. Admission is free, so bring the whole family for a classic 2026 Fourth of July celebration.

events.title: Tempe 4th of July Celebration 2026: Tempe Town Lake Fireworks Festival
events.description: Ring in the Fourth of July at Tempe Beach Park with Arizona's biggest fireworks celebration over Tempe Town Lake. This all-ages festival packs live entertainment, food vendors, games, and water slides before a spectacular fireworks show at about 9:15 p.m. A ticketed family event, it's a Valley July 4th tradition for 2026.
events.cost: Ticketed: $12 adults, $5 children ages 5-12, free for ages 4 and under

events.title: Arizona Celebration of Freedom 2026: Free July 4th Festival in Downtown Mesa
events.description: The Arizona Celebration of Freedom is Arizona's largest free Fourth of July party, taking over Downtown Mesa with patriotic fun for the whole family. Enjoy live music, the Yankee Doodle Kids' Zone carnival games, historic flag displays, and a dazzling fireworks finale. Free admission makes this a can't-miss 2026 July 4th celebration.

events.title: Chandler All-American Bash 2026: Free July 4th Fireworks in Downtown Chandler
events.description: Chandler's All-American Bash brings a free, family-friendly Fourth of July to Dr. A.J. Chandler Park in Downtown Chandler. Enjoy live entertainment and family activities before a 15-minute pyrotechnic show lights up the sky at 8:15 p.m. This free 2026 July 4th celebration is perfect for all ages.
events.venue: Dr. A.J. Chandler Park: Stage Plaza

events.title: Gilbert 4th of July Celebration 2026: Free Fireworks & Drone Show at Gilbert Regional Park
events.description: Gilbert's free 4th of July Celebration returns to Gilbert Regional Park with live performances, a drone show, and a fireworks finale. This family-friendly festival opens at 5 p.m. with fireworks beginning around 8:50 p.m. General admission is free, making it a great 2026 Independence Day outing for the whole family.

events.title: Peoria All-American Festival 2026: Free July 4th Fireworks at Peoria Sports Complex
events.description: The Peoria All-American Festival delivers a free Fourth of July celebration at Peoria Sports Complex with live concerts, family attractions, and one of the Valley's most spectacular fireworks finales. This 2026 July 4th festival is free to attend and packed with family fun. Bring bottled water and lawn chairs for an unforgettable Independence Day.

events.title: Scottsdale 4th of July Celebration 2026: Fireworks Spectacular at WestWorld
events.description: Scottsdale's 4th of July Celebration lights up WestWorld with the largest fireworks display in city history starting at 9 p.m. This family-friendly event features a kids zone, games, and patriotic activities for all ages. A ticketed 2026 Independence Day celebration the whole family can enjoy.

events.title: Glendale Firework Fest 2026: Free July 3rd Fireworks at Westgate Entertainment District
events.description: Kick off the holiday weekend at Westgate's free Firework Fest in Glendale on July 3, 2026. This family-friendly celebration features live music, train rides, bounce houses, a water play zone, and a fireworks show at 9 p.m. Free to attend with free parking, it's a perfect all-ages start to the Fourth of July weekend.
